item.title: 美联储终止对富国银行因虚假账户丑闻实施的执法行动
item.description: 美国联邦储备委员会周四宣布，已终止对富国银行实施的执法行动。此前该银行因大规模虚假账户丑闻受到处罚，美联储表示该行已充分改革其运营体系。【原文：The U.S. Federal ​Reserve announced Thursday ‌that it had terminated the enforcement ​action it ​imposed on Wells Fargo ⁠following the ​bank's widespread fake ​accounts scandal, saying the bank had sufficiently ​overhauled its ​operations.】

item.title: 奈飞收购本·阿弗莱克的人工智能电影技术公司
item.description: 网飞公司周四宣布已收购InterPositive公司。这家由奥斯卡奖得主本·阿弗莱克创立的影视制作技术公司，致力于开发人工智能驱动的电影制作工具。【原文：Netflix said on Thursday it has acquired InterPositive, a filmmaking technology company founded by Academy Award winner ​Ben Affleck that produces artificial intelligence-powered tools for movie ‌production.】

item.title: 美国众议院委员会要求旅游公司就人工智能定价问题作出说明
item.description: 美国众议院监督委员会主席周四要求优步、Lyft和Expedia等五家大型旅游公司首席执行官披露，是否通过监控消费者定价来抬高费用。【原文：The chair of the U.S. House ​Oversight Committee on Thursday asked ‌the CEOs of five major travel companies including Uber, ​Lyft and Expedia to ​disclose if they were ⁠using surveillance pricing of ​consumers to hike costs.】

item.title: 中东冲突推动投资者涌入货币市场基金
item.description: 全球投资者正蜂拥涌入货币市场基金，因中东冲突升级加剧了市场对油价冲击、通胀攀升及利率上升的担忧。【原文：Global investors are flocking ​to money ‌market funds as an escalating ​Middle ​East conflict fuels fears ⁠of an ​oil price ​shock, rising inflation and higher interest ​rates.】

item.title: Sage公司筹集6500万美元资金，用于扩大面向美国老年人的AI辅助护理服务
item.description: 总部位于纽约的老年护理科技公司Sage周四宣布，已完成6500万美元新一轮融资，用于扩展其人工智能平台。该平台旨在为养老院和辅助生活设施的护理人员提供支持。【原文：Sage, a New York-based senior care technology firm, said on Thursday it has raised $65 million in ​new funding to expand its artificial intelligence platform ‌designed to help caregivers in nursing homes and assisted living facilities.】

item.title: 特朗普与邦迪因批准字节跳动TikTok美国资产出售案面临诉讼
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和司法部长帕姆·邦迪周四因美国政府批准TikTok中国母公司字节跳动建立美国控股合资企业的交易而被起诉。原告称该批准决定违法，且不符合2024年法律的要求。【原文：President Donald Trump and Attorney General Pam Bondi ​were sued Thursday over the ‌U.S. government's approval of a deal by TikTok's Chinese owner ByteDance to ​establish a majority American-owned ​joint venture, saying the approval was ⁠illegal and did not ​meet the requirements of a 2024 ​law.】

item.title: 智利国家铜业公司与微软签署采矿业务人工智能合作协议
item.description: 智利国有企业科德尔科（全球最大铜生产商）周四宣布，已与微软签署谅解备忘录，双方将评估在人工智能、高级分析、自动化及数字安全领域的合作计划。【原文：Chile's state-owned Codelco, the world's largest copper producer, and Microsoft signed a ​memorandum of understanding to evaluate joint initiatives ‌in artificial intelligence, advanced analytics, automation and digital security, the miner said on Thursday.】

item.title: 资本品价格上涨推高美国1月进口通胀
item.description: 美国政府周四公布的数据显示，1月份美国进口价格出现上涨，能源产品成本的下降被资本货物价格的飙升所抵消。【原文：U.S. import prices increased in January as a decline in the cost of energy products was more than offset by a surge in capital goods prices, government data ​showed on Thursday.】

item.title: 美国第四季度生产率增速放缓
item.description: 美国工人生产率在第四季度放缓，但整体趋势依然强劲，有效抑制了劳动力成本的增长。【原文：U.S. worker productivity slowed in the fourth quarter, but the trend remained solid, keeping growth in labor ​costs in check.】

item.title: CVS携手谷歌云推出人工智能驱动的健康平台
item.description: CVS Health周四宣布，将与谷歌母公司Alphabet旗下的谷歌云部门合作推出人工智能平台，该平台将整合多元化数据源，帮助客户实时管理健康状况。【原文：CVS Health will launch an AI-enabled platform in partnership with Alphabet's Google Cloud unit that will ​bring together data from diverse sources to help ‌customers manage their health in real time, they said on Thursday.】

item.title: 美联储巴金：顽固通胀与强劲就业数据或改变美联储风险展望 - 彭博电视
item.description: 里士满联储主席汤姆·巴金表示，当前通胀率仍居高不下，加之近期就业数据表现强劲，可能改变美联储的风险展望。与此同时，美国与伊朗的冲突可能进一步推高关键消费价格。【原文：Richmond Fed president Tom Barkin said still high inflation ​and stronger recent jobs numbers may ‌shift the Fed's risk outlook at a time when the U.S. conflict with ​Iran could further push up ​key consumer prices.】

item.title: 美元、债券还是黄金——哪种才是最安全的避风港？
item.description: 中东局势动荡再度引发投资者争相寻求避险资产，由此重新点燃了关于哪些资产能在危机时期真正提供保护的争论。【原文：Turmoil in the Middle East has sent investors scrambling for safety once more, reigniting a debate over which assets truly offer protection in times of stress.】

item.title: 亚马逊推出人工智能平台，实现医疗行政任务自动化
item.description: 亚马逊云服务部门AWS周四宣布推出一款人工智能平台，旨在为患者提供便捷的医疗服务，同时减轻医疗服务提供者的行政负担。【原文：Amazon's cloud unit, AWS, said on Thursday it had launched an artificial intelligence-enabled platform ​that aims to ease access to care for ‌patients and cut administrative work for healthcare providers.】

item.title: 美国当周初请失业金人数持平；2月裁员量下降55%
item.description: 上周美国初请失业金人数持平，而2月份裁员人数大幅下降，这与稳定的劳动力市场状况相一致。【原文：The number of Americans filing new applications for unemployment benefits was unchanged last week while layoffs dropped sharply in February, consistent with stable labor market conditions.】

item.title: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦重启股票回购，首席执行官阿贝尔称此举有助于创造价值
item.description: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司周四宣布，在近两年暂停回购后，已开始重新购回公司股票。此前，格雷格·阿贝尔于今年1月接替沃伦·巴菲特出任首席执行官，正着手在集团内推行其经营理念。【原文：Berkshire Hathaway said on Thursday it has begun repurchasing ​its own shares after a nearly two-year hiatus, as ‌Greg Abel begins putting his stamp on the conglomerate after succeeding Warren Buffett as chief executive in January.】

item.title: 伊朗冲突扩大威胁巴西粮食出口与化肥供应
item.description: 分析师和贸易数据显示，中东地区是巴西农产品出口的主要目的地，也是尿素等化肥的重要供应地。随着中东地区冲突不断升级，巴西农民可能面临压力。【原文：Brazilian farmers may be squeezed by the escalating conflict in the Middle East, according to analysts and ​trade data showing the region is a key destination for Brazil's farm exports and an important provider of fertilizers such as ‌urea.】

item.title: 达美航空高层人事变动：首席财务官詹基转任首席运营官，卡特出任总裁
item.description: 达美航空周四宣布进行大规模领导层调整，任命首席财务官丹·扬基为首席运营官，并提拔彼得·卡特担任总裁。此次人事变动旨在为长期运营主管约翰·劳瑟即将退休做准备。【原文：Delta Air Lines on Thursday ‌announced a broad leadership shake-up, naming Chief Financial Officer Dan Janki as chief operating officer and promoting Peter Carter to president as the carrier prepares for the ​retirement of longtime operations chief John Laughter.】

item.title: 加密货币交易所OKX估值达250亿美元，纽约证券交易所母公司注资后
item.description: 全球最大加密货币交易所之一OKX在获得洲际交易所（Intercontinental Exchange）的少数股权投资后，估值达到250亿美元。纽约证券交易所母公司于周四宣布了这一消息。【原文：OKX, one of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchanges, was valued at $25 billion after it received a minority ​investment from Intercontinental Exchange , the NYSE parent said on Thursday.】

item.title: 随着美伊冲突在该地区蔓延，更多油轮遭到袭击
item.description: 随着美伊战争升级，周四更多油轮在波斯湾海域遭遇袭击，伊朗无人机进入阿塞拜疆境内，危机有向该地区更多产油国蔓延之势。【原文：More tankers came under attack in Gulf waters on Thursday as the U.S.–Iran war escalated, and Iranian drones entered ​Azerbaijan, threatening to spread the crisis to more oil producers in the region.】

item.title: 美国稀土公司将以7300万美元收购得克萨斯州圆顶矿床剩余股权
item.description: 美国稀土公司周四宣布，将以7300万美元的全股票交易收购得克萨斯州某稀土矿床剩余少数股权，此举旨在推动关键矿产的国内生产。【原文：USA Rare Earth said on Thursday it would acquire the remaining minority interest ​in a Texas rare earth deposit in an all-stock transaction ‌worth $73 million, as part of its efforts to boost domestic production of critical minerals.】

item.title: Meta将允许AI竞争对手进入WhatsApp，以避免欧盟采取行动
item.description: Meta Platforms公司表示，将允许人工智能竞争对手在WhatsApp平台上运营一年，此举旨在避免欧盟反垄断监管机构可能颁布的临时禁令——此前被该即时通讯服务拒之门外的竞争对手曾提出投诉。【原文：Artificial intelligence rivals will be allowed on WhatsApp for a year, Meta Platforms said, aiming to head off a possible temporary order from EU ​antitrust regulators after complaints from competitors shut out of the messaging service.】

item.title: 早盘行情：全球市场暂歇
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: DHL继续接受中东地区订单，但提醒可能出现延误
item.description: 尽管中东地区冲突不断升级，DHL首席执行官周四表示该公司仍在接受该地区的配送订单，但警告称将出现延误。【原文：DHL is still accepting delivery orders in the Middle East despite ​the escalating conflict, its chief executive ‌said on Thursday, but warned there would be delays.】

item.title: 消息人士称，印度炼油厂正开采俄罗斯近海浮式原油
item.description: 据两位知情人士周四透露，印度炼油商已开始从停泊在印度海岸外的油轮上提取俄罗斯原油，以弥补因伊朗战争导致的中东原油供应缺口。【原文：Refiners in India have started tapping Russian oil aboard vessels floating off ‌the country's coast to make up for the loss of Middle Eastern crude due to the Iran war, two sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Thursday.】

item.title: 克罗格公司预测年度销售额和利润增长乏力，新任首席执行官正式履新
item.description: 克罗格公司周四预测全年销售额和利润增长乏力，这家超市连锁运营商在新任首席执行官领导下正面临消费环境的不确定性。【原文：Kroger forecast tepid annual sales and profit ​on Thursday, as the supermarket ‌chain operator navigates an uncertain spending environment under a new CEO.】

item.title: 比亚迪推出新一代刀片电池，具备寒冷环境下的快速充电能力
item.description: 中国汽车制造商比亚迪董事长王传福周四发布了第二代刀片电池，称其在极寒环境下具备"颠覆性"充电速度。【原文：Chinese carmaker BYD's chairman Wang Chuanfu ​on Thursday launched the second-generation of the ‌Blade Battery, with what he says is a "disruptive" charging speed in extremely cold environments.】

item.title: 英国新锐品牌Nothing为新款手机注入缤纷色彩，打破科技界的"单调"局面
item.description: Nothing——这家由卡尔·佩伊在伦敦创立的智能手机制造商——于周四推出了新款中端手机和耳机，在原有的白、黑、灰三色基础上新增配色，以吸引精通数字技术的年轻客户。【原文：Nothing, ​the smartphone maker founded in London by Carl Pei, launched new mid-tier handsets and ‌headphones on Thursday, adding new colours to its white, black and grey palette to appeal to digitally adept younger customers.】

item.title: 私募股权公司审慎评估数据公司交易，人工智能担忧抑制投资热情
item.description: 金融数据提供商FactSet近几个月引起了托马斯·布拉沃和赫尔曼·弗里德曼的关注。据三位知情人士透露，在人工智能颠覆性担忧推动其股价过去六个月下跌39%后，这两家私募股权公司正评估潜在收购方案。【原文：Financial data provider FactSet caught the eye of Thoma Bravo and Hellman & Friedman in recent months, with both private equity firms running the numbers on a potential ​acquisition after AI disruption fears helped drive a 39% drop in its shares over the last six months, three people familiar with the matter say.】

item.title: Revolut申请美国银行牌照，任命杜兰索伊为美国首席执行官
item.description: 英国金融科技公司Revolut周四宣布，已申请美国银行牌照，并任命前Visa高管塞廷·杜兰索伊（Cetin Duransoy）为美国新任首席执行官。【原文：Britain's Revolut applied for a U.S. bank charter and appointed former Visa executive Cetin Duransoy as its new CEO for the United ​States, the fintech company announced on Thursday.】

item.title: 博通股价上涨，因其宣称2027年人工智能芯片销售额将突破1000亿美元
item.description: 博通股价周四盘前大涨约7%，此前该公司表示预计2027年人工智能芯片销售额将突破1000亿美元，正积极进军长期由英伟达主导的市场。【原文：Broadcom shares jumped about 7% before the bell on Thursday after the company said it expects artificial intelligence ​chip sales to top $100 billion in 2027, as ‌it pushes into a market long ruled by Nvidia.】
